# Third-party license files

This directory contains the license texts and attribution records for third-party components bundled into `index.html`.

## Included files

- `react-18.3.1-LICENSE.txt`
- `react-dom-18.3.1-LICENSE.txt`
- `three-r128-LICENSE.txt`
- `d3-7.8.5-LICENSE.txt`
- `tailwindcss-3.4.17-LICENSE.txt`
- `modernizr-3.0.0pre-custom-build-NOTICE.txt`

These files are provided to preserve copyright and license notices for the bundled JavaScript and generated CSS.
